'''Ahmed Mousa Ibrahim Metani''' ({{langx|ar|أحمد موسى إبراهيم ميتاني}}; born December 3, 1980) is a Palestinian politician, diplomat, and writer. He currently serves as the Ambassador of the State of Palestine to the Republic of Azerbaijan since April 16, 2025.<ref>{{Cite web|last=Azvision|first=|date=2025|title=Azerbaijani FM meets incoming Palestinian Ambassador|url=https://en.azvision.az/news/188768/azerbaijani-fm-meets-incoming-palestinian-ambassador.html|access-date=2025-11-20|website=azvision.az|language=en}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|last=Rehimov|first=Ruslan|date=2025-06-15|title=علييف: أذربيجان ستواصل دعم المطالب العادلة للشعب الفلسطيني|url=https://www.aa.com.tr/ar/%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%AF%D9%88%D9%84-%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%B9%D8%B1%D8%A8%D9%8A%D8%A9/%D8%B9%D9%84%D9%8A%D9%8A%D9%81-%D8%A3%D8%B0%D8%B1%D8%A8%D9%8A%D8%AC%D8%A7%D9%86-%D8%B3%D8%AA%D9%88%D8%A7%D8%B5%D9%84-%D8%AF%D8%B9%D9%85-%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%85%D8%B7%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%A8-%D8%A7%D9%84%D8%B9%D8%A7%D8%AF%D9%84%D8%A9-%D9%84%D9%84%D8%B4%D8%B9%D8%A8-%D8%A7%D9%84%D9%81%D9%84%D8%B3%D8%B7%D9%8A%D9%86%D9%8A/3599133|url-status=dead|website=Anadolu Ajansı}}</ref> He previously held several diplomatic posts in [[Malaysia]], [[Indonesia]], and the [[Philippines]], focusing on consular, cultural, commercial, and educational affairs.

== Early life and education ==
Ahmed Metani was born on December 3, 1980, in the village of [[Immatain]] near [[Nablus]], [[Palestine]]. He studied at King Talal School in [[Nablus]] and completed his primary and secondary education in his hometown. He obtained a bachelor's degree from [[An-Najah National University]] in [[Palestine]] and later earned both a Master's and a PhD in E-Commerce from the University of Science in [[Malaysia]]. In his youth, Metani was a professional volleyball player in [[Palestine]] before pursuing a diplomatic career.{{Citation needed|date=November 2025}}

=== Personal life ===
Metani is married with three children.{{Citation needed|date=November 2025}}

== Diplomatic career ==
Metani joined the Palestinian diplomatic service in the early 2000s and served in several countries:

* Malaysia (2005–2017): Worked at the Embassy of [[Palestine]] in Kuala Lumpur for 12 years, covering consular, cultural, and commercial affairs.{{sfn|MFA Malaysia|2014|pp=117}} Oversaw neighboring countries such as [[Thailand]], [[Brunei]], and the [[Maldives]], organized cultural exhibitions, and collaborated with NGOs and universities.{{sfn|MFA Malaysia|2013|pp=94}}
* Indonesia (2017–2025): Served as Deputy Ambassador in Jakarta for 8 years, engaging in initiatives related to educational and humanitarian cooperation.<ref>{{Cite web|last=antaranews.com|date=2023-11-29|title=Palestina tetap jadi prioritas kebijakan luar negeri Indonesia|url=https://www.antaranews.com/berita/3846768/palestina-tetap-jadi-prioritas-kebijakan-luar-negeri-indonesia|access-date=2025-11-20|website=Antara News|language=id}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|last=Agency|first=ANTARA News|title=Kedubes Palestina larang warga serahkan bantuan donasi di luar kedutaan - ANTARA News Aceh|url=https://aceh.antaranews.com/berita/236426/kedubes-palestina-larang-warga-serahkan-bantuan-donasi-di-luar-kedutaan|access-date=2025-11-22|website=Antara News}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|title=Palestine Thanks Jokowi Government for Support During Gaza Conflicts|url=https://jakartaglobe.id/news/palestine-thanks-jokowi-government-for-support-during-gaza-conflicts|url-status=dead|access-date=2025-11-22|website=Jakarta Globe}}</ref>
* Philippines : Acted as Chargé d'Affaires of the Palestinian Embassy in [[Manila]].{{Citation needed|date=November 2025}}
* Azerbaijan (2025–present): Presented credentials as Ambassador of Palestine to Azerbaijan on April 16, 2025.<ref>{{cite web
 |url         = https://en.apa.az/foreign-policy/azerbaijani-fm-meets-palestinian-ambassador-465429
 |archiveurl  =

 |accessdate  = 21 November 2025
 |language    = 
}}</ref><ref>{{cite web
 |url         = https://en.azvision.az/news/188768/azerbaijani-fm-meets-incoming-palestinian-ambassador.html
 |archiveurl  =

 |title       = Azerbaijani FM meets incoming Palestinian Ambassador
 |author      = 
 |date        = 17 April 2025
 |work        = 
 |publisher   = en.azvision.az
 |accessdate  = 21 November 2025
 |language    = 
}}</ref>

Metani focuses on political, economic, cultural, and humanitarian cooperation, and represents Palestinian positions within international organizations, including the [[United Nations]] and the [[Organisation of Islamic Cooperation|Organization of Islamic Cooperation.]]{{Citation needed|date=November 2025}}

== Academic work and publications ==
Metani has published research in international journals, notably "Social Psychology Theories Be Applied to Achieve Strategic Political Objective", discussing the application of psychology in political strategy.<ref>{{cite journal
 | last1       = Metani
 | first1      = Ahmed M. I.
 | last2       = Al-Allan
 | first2      = Marwan
 | title       = Can Social Psychology Theories Be Applied to Achieve Strategic Political Objectives?
 | journal     = International Journal of Art & Humanity Science
 | volume      = 2
 | issue       = 1
 | pages       = 1–4
 | date        = January–February 2015
 | url         = http://www.ijahs.com.pk/index.php/ijahs
 | issn        = 2349-5235
}}</ref>

He is also a novelist. His Arabic novel ''{{lang|ar|الأستاذ نعمان: رسالة الحياة}}'' (English: ''Professor Naaman: Life's Message'') explores intellectual tolerance, acceptance of diversity, and coexistence.<ref>{{Cite book|last=احمد ميتاني|first=مروان العلان|url=https://library.alistiqlal.edu.ps/alistiqlal.edu.psps/book-12730-11204.html|title=الاستاذ نعمان : رسالة الحياة|year=2013}}</ref>
